changeSet.author: aurora-hms

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM communication.comm_template WHERE template_key = 'appointment.lifecycle' AND channel = 'SMS' AND locale = 'bn' AND status = 'ACTIVE'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO communication.comm_template ( id, template_key, channel, locale, version, status, subject_template, body_template, variables_schema, created_by, created_at, updated_at, activated_at, activated_by ) VALUES ( 'f1e2d3c4-b5a6-4789-abcd-ef0000000007'::uuid, 'appointment.lifecycle', 'SMS', 'bn', 1, 'ACTIVE', NULL, 'আসসালামু আলাইকুম, {{appointmentDate}} তারিখে {{doctorName}} এর কাছে আপনার {{tokenLabel}} এর সিরিয়াল নির্ধারিত হয়েছে। রিপোর্ট করুন {{reportTimeWindow}} এ, {{locationLine}}। {{mapsUrl}}', '{"allowed":["patientName","appointmentDate","recipientPhone","doctorName","tokenLabel","reportTimeWindow","locationLine","mapsUrl","appointmentId","patientId","slotStart","slotEnd","status","lifecycleKind"]}', 'liquibase:007-appointment-sms-template-bn', NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 'liquibase:007-appointment-sms-template-bn' );
